name: Chocolate Chunky Mighty Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: flour, bran cereal flakes, rolled oats, brown sugar, baking soda in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk powder, water, and egg until smooth.
3. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture, stirring until just combined (lumpy texture is okay).
4. Stir in chocolate chunks and chopped nuts.
5. Fill lined muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean and the tops are golden brown.
